reasoning: Zootopia 2 is scheduled to be released on November 26, 2025. This question asks whether it will be the top grossing movie of 2025 on Box Office Mojo's 2025 calendar gross list. The movie will only have about 35 days in the calendar year 2025 to generate revenue. This is a significant disadvantage compared to summer blockbusters like "Jurassic World Rebirth", "A Minecraft Movie", or "Superman", which had many months to accumulate their grosses. Although "Inside Out 2" recently posted record-breaking grosses, capturing the highest gross of the entire calendar year in just 35 days requires an extraordinarily massive opening and incredible holds, on top of assuming no other movie in 2025 crosses the $400-$600 million threshold. Although highly anticipated, having to beat out huge franchise films like Jurassic World and Superman with less than a month of playtime is an uphill battle. A 24% baseline from the market is quite high but reasonable considering Zootopia is a massive franchise, but given the calendar restrictions, I assess it as lower, around 18%. Avatar 3 comes out even later (Dec 19) so it also won't win calendar year 2025.
